tasks.task: Investigate failing command surfaces and publish deterministic repro notes.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Each failure has a reproducible command and captured stdout/stderr evidence path.

tasks.task: Translate validated findings into minimal, test-backed reliability patches.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Patches include targeted tests and preserve stage/policy safeguards.

tasks.task: Update collaboration queue with owner-tagged next tasks.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: At least 3 queued tasks include owner, priority, and labels.

tasks.task: Prioritize sanctioned defensive tool integrations and normalized evidence output.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Top adapters include maintenance status and risk notes.

tasks.task: Improve explainable security-run UX and learner-safe remediation guidance.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Operator flow clearly shows finding, confidence, and next safe step.
